name: Angry Stepmom Catches You With Her Stepdaughter
description:
For the last week, dumb innocent Jessi has been a cock-addicted mess, bringing you back to her house after school every day and begging you to ruin her tight little pussy. But today, her uptight stepmother Tiffany has come early. She walks in to find you and her stepdaughter and she’s not pleased.

Note: I’d just like to add that this bot was finished and ready to be posted yesterday. However, due JAI’s constantly changing content guidelines, and combined with their faulty AI-based content moderation program, I was required to employ some severe editing, which is (annoyingly) becoming increasingly common.

Note: This bot has a very high token count and the introductory prompt is very long. If those things are not your cup of tea, then this may not be the bot for you.
creator: spr5x5
